ideation: This sequence depicts the robot setting up camp. It starts with both arms relaxed, then raises one arm to place a hypothetical tent pole, and finally both arms gesture towards the completed campsite. Frame 1: Both arms are down, indicating readiness. Frame 2: The left arm is raised, indicating the placement of a tent pole (or similar action). Frame 3: The right arm also rises, as the tent is erected (or a similar action is completed). Frame 4: Both arms gesture towards the successfully set up campsite, expressing satisfaction.  Frame 5: Both arms return to a relaxed resting position.

frames.beat: arms hang down, ready to begin
left arm raises to place a tent pole
right arm joins, raising the tent structure
both arms gesture to the finished campsite
arms relax, camp is set up
